headlines.title: U.S. strikes 'multiple targets' in Iran after Trump threatened more attacks
Iran Updates: Trump vows to hit Iran 'hard' tonight, Hegseth says U.S. willing to 'negotiate with bombs' if needed
West Asia war LIVE: Iran has taken too long to negotiate, they will have to pay the price, says Trump
Morning Briefing: US strikes hit southern Iran, IRGC says 21 US military targets hit across region
US bombs Iran's water facilities: Why that's so significant

notes: Equities sold off sharply as AI and technology stocks faced downward pressure and U.S.-Iran hostilities escalated.
Brent crude rose above $93 per barrel as the renewed exchange of strikes between the U.S. and Iran threatens to prolong the blockade on the Strait of Hormuz.
Volatility spiked significantly, with the VIX jumping over 11% to 22.22 amid market uncertainty and rising geopolitical tensions.
